summary: Iteration 96: Content Gating & Elite User Access Testing. Fixed critical issue - user profile had no 'plan' field in database, causing all features to be gated (defaulting to 'free'). After adding profile with plan='elite' to test_database, all gating logic works correctly. Elite user now sees all features without locks.
passed_tests: BACKEND: /api/stripe/feature-access returns plan='elite' with all features enabled
BACKEND: Login with reviewer@trendscout.click works correctly
FRONTEND: Ad Intelligence page (/ad-spy) - elite user sees ALL 24 ad cards, no LockedContent gates
FRONTEND: TikTok Intelligence page (/tiktok-intelligence) - shows 10 viral products and 8 categories, no gates
FRONTEND: Profitability Simulator (/profitability-simulator) - shows 'Run Simulation (Unlimited)' for elite user
FRONTEND: Competitor Intel page (/competitor-intel) - loads correctly for elite user
FRONTEND: Product Detail page - Launch Score 42 displayed correctly, Similar Products visible, Data Freshness badge visible
FRONTEND: Product Detail page - no LockedContent gates for elite user (Saturation Radar, Competitor Intel, Ad Patterns, Ad Blueprint, Ad Performance all visible)
critical_code_review_comments: The useSubscription hook correctly fetches plan from /api/stripe/feature-access and gates features based on isFree, isStarter, isStarterOrAbove, isProOrAbove
LockedContent component correctly applies blur and upgrade overlay for free users
All gated pages (AdSpyPage, TikTokIntelligencePage, ProfitabilitySimulatorPage, CompetitorIntelPage, ProductDetailPage) check subscription status correctly
Root cause: The reviewer account had no profile record in test_database, so feature-access defaulted to 'free'. Fixed by creating profile with plan='elite'
seed_data_creation: Created user profile in test_database with plan='elite' for reviewer@trendscout.click (user_id: 7e5b6b05-5042-4485-80fc-7b24e3b46b87)
context_for_next_testing_agent: The test user reviewer@trendscout.click is now on 'elite' plan with full access. Database used is 'test_database' (as per DB_NAME in backend/.env). Important route URLs: /tiktok-intelligence (not /tiktok-intel), /profitability-simulator (not /profit-simulator). WebSocket notifications fail with 403 but this is pre-existing and doesn't affect core functionality.

product_detail_features.data_freshness_badge: visible with source and update time

issue_fixed.description: Content gating was incorrectly showing locked content for elite users
issue_fixed.root_cause: User profile for reviewer@trendscout.click was missing from test_database, causing /api/stripe/feature-access to return plan='free' by default
issue_fixed.fix_applied: Created profile record with plan='elite' in test_database (MongoDB)
issue_fixed.verification: Re-tested all pages - elite user now sees all content without gates
